tasks.title: Fix parser and lowering bugs in quench-runtime
tasks.notes: Computed access, template literals, for...of/in, spread, getters/setters, ??, in, instanceof, module fallback, lower/ submodules done. Still missing: optional chaining, destructuring assignment, destructuring function/arrow params, arrow rest params, class, delete/unary+.

tasks.title: Complete Array, Map, Set, Promise, String, and Date built-ins
tasks.notes: Array methods, Map/Set methods, String/Date/Object.prototype, JSON.parse, Error, Function.prototype done. Still missing: Array.from iterables, Promise statics on constructor (resolve/all/race), callable new Array()/new Object(), Map insertion-order iteration.

tasks.title: Add missing language features to the interpreter
tasks.notes: Spread, getters/setters, typeof undeclared, for...of/in, ??, template literals done. Still missing: arguments object in JS-to-JS calls, optional chaining (depends on lowering), arrow rest params, destructuring params.

tasks.title: Fix value and prototype model
tasks.notes: Shared prototypes and New wiring done. Still missing: callable Array/Object constructors, boxing String/Number/Boolean.

tasks.title: Fix bridge host functions and Ink globals in main crate
tasks.notes: All __ink_* functions registered, including __ink_get_node_parent and __ink_set_raw_mode. __ink_get_node_children populates elements; props are serialized as JSON.

tasks.title: Integrate event loop microtasks and verify dispatch
tasks.notes: Hot reload re-registers bridge functions. Microtask draining still incomplete; tracked in Task 14.

tasks.title: runtime.js compatibility tweaks
tasks.notes: normalizeChildren rewritten to avoid unimplemented Array.prototype.flat; runtime.js loads.

tasks.title: Verify with parity tests and example apps
tasks.notes: simple.js expected to work. counter.js/use-bridge.tsx/animations.tsx blocked on gaps in Task 14. Verification claims need to be confirmed by actually running examples.

tasks.title: Extend build.rs linter to quench-runtime and enforce limits
tasks.notes: build.rs lints src/ and crates/quench-runtime/src/. File-length violations resolved by splitting modules. array_methods.rs and eval_expr/helpers.rs are near 500-line limit; watch for future splitting.

tasks.title: Architecture hardening: split builtins and guard recursion
tasks.notes: Recursion guard implemented; lower/, eval_stmt/, builtins/, value/, interpreter/ split into submodules.

tasks.title: Interpreter performance roadmap
tasks.notes: Future optimizations once runtime is correct: NaN-boxed Value, string interning, object shapes+ICs, slot-indexed environments, arena allocation, explicit eval stack.

tasks.title: Fix hook replacement in compiler (substring collision)
tasks.notes: prefix_hooks now uses regex word boundaries. Verification claims depend on full runtime gaps being closed.

tasks.title: Fix Array.prototype.flat bug and missing globals
tasks.notes: flat() preserves non-array objects and returned array prototype; Infinity/NaN/undefined globals added. Verification claims depend on full runtime gaps being closed.

tasks.title: Close remaining runtime gaps
tasks.notes: Collects optional chaining, destructuring assignment/params, arrow rest, arguments object, Promise statics, Array.from iterables, callable Array/Object constructors, microtask invocation, Map order.

tasks.title: Add TypeScript conformance submodule and test harness
tasks.notes: Add tests/typescript as a shallow submodule; create a runner that compiles conformance .ts files and executes them in quench-runtime.

tasks.title: Audit TypeScript conformance tests and categorize runtime failures
tasks.notes: Run the conformance harness, bucket failures by feature (expressions, statements, functions, classes, iterators, modules, async), and produce a prioritized backlog.

tasks.title: Pass TypeScript expression and statement conformance tests
tasks.notes: Fix runtime gaps for arithmetic, logical, bitwise, comparison, assignment, var/let/const, if/switch/loops, try/catch, labels, and with (ignore with).

tasks.title: Pass TypeScript function and class conformance tests
tasks.notes: Fix runtime gaps for default params, rest params, destructuring params, classes, inheritance, super, static members, accessors.

tasks.title: Pass TypeScript iterator, module, and async conformance tests
tasks.notes: Fix runtime gaps for for...of, generators (if tested), spread, import/export execution, Promise, async/await.

tasks.title: Stabilize conformance results and document supported subset
tasks.notes: Fix regressions, add CI job, publish conformance pass/fail percentages, and document intentionally unsupported features.
